# familio_union (Resource)

A union (marriage/partnership) linking persons in a familio.org family tree. NOTE: not yet creatable — the Familio write API is still being reverse-engineered.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `children` (Set of String) UUIDs of the children of the union.
- `divorce_date` (String) Divorce date.
- `marriage_date` (String) Marriage date.
- `partners` (Set of String) UUIDs of the partner persons in the union.
- `uuid` (String) The familio.org union UUID.
